title: The Mental Technique That Rewires Anxiety: Building Your Internal Safe Place
excerpt: Anxiety tricks your nervous system into responding to things that are not actually happening right now. There is a technique that literally changes the neural pathways responsible — and it does not require years of therapy to learn.
